Portfolio Dashboard

Last updated: 2026-03-21 (post-rescore) · 3 of 12 slots · 77% deployed · 23% cash · All INVESTMENT · Wtd conviction 9.3

Conviction Rescore Complete — VOW 10/10 (First 6/5 Scores)
VOW D1→6/5 (24% new-contract margin slide), D2→6/5 (single division >2x group EV). Cluster A 107%. CF D1→5/5 (S3 pricing confirmed). GTT D7→5/5 (strongest evidence base). MEOH remapped to standard D1-D8 framework. Portfolio wtd avg conviction 8.5→9.3. CWA 6.56→7.15.
Imminent Catalysts — Tampa NH3 Settlement + USDA Mar 31
Tampa ammonia settlement (late Mar/early Apr) — first war-conditions NH3 benchmark; 30.7% of CF revenue. USDA Prospective Plantings Mar 31 (10 days) — corn >93M acres = demand intact; <92M = 10%+ volume headwind.
DOJ Antitrust Probe (CF) + Orica $169.5M Settlement
DOJ investigating CF, Nutrien, Mosaic, Koch, Yara for potential fertilizer price-fixing. Civil AND criminal under review. Grand jury = material; civil = manageable. Orica $169.5M cash H2 2026. Monitor Q1 10-Q (May).

Exposure Analysis — What the Portfolio Depends On
Geopolitical (CF + GTT = 37%)
Hormuz Day 22. S3 55%. Trump rules out ceasefire. Iran proposing transit tolls. Ras Laffan 17% destroyed (3-5yr repair) = structural beyond ceasefire. QatarEnergy second FM on 3-5yr contracts. GTT Hormuz premium only ~3-4% of YTD — structural thesis.
Micro-Execution (77% of portfolio)
VOW (40%): D1=6/5, D2=6/5. Q1 May 20 — 24% new-contract margin to confirm. CF (17%): D1=5/5, S3 pricing confirmed. Tampa NH3 imminent. USDA Mar 31. DOJ probe. GTT (20%): D7=5/5. Q1 activity Apr 22. 9 LNGCs ordered Q1.
Macro
Fed 3.5-3.75%; PCE ↑2.7%; 1 cut in 2026. 10Y 4.27% (+25bps). Inflation re-acceleration risk (oil $100+). WTI ~$98, Brent peaked $126. No recession signal. India Kharif Apr-Jun.
Market Structure
VOW: zero coverage, ~NOK 2.60, D2=6/5 (single division >2x group EV). CF: #1 S&P performer (+59% YTD), consensus not reflecting S3. GTT: consensus revenue gap (Apr 22 event). MEOH: 7 analysts, consensus frozen pre-Hormuz, PT below price.
